hero_desc: Software Engineer with over 5 years of experience building secure, high-performance core systems. My specialty lies in enterprise-scale System Design and Backend Engineering, but I am equally highly capable of crafting modern, interactive Frontend experiences.
about_p1: Hello! I'm Riyan Sugiarto, a Software Engineer heavily focused on System Design and Backend Architecture. I have over 5 years of experience architecting secure, enterprise-scale core systems for the telecommunications and financial industries.
about_p2: My core expertise lies in designing scalable microservices, modernizing complex legacy infrastructures, and optimizing large-scale databases. While my heart is in the backend, I am highly proficient in Frontend development, allowing me to deliver end-to-end Full-Stack solutions. I am deeply passionate about slashing operational costs, maximizing performance, and building automated workflows.
tech_backend_skills: Java, Spring Boot, Quarkus, System Design, Microservices
tech_frontend_skills: React, Angular, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Web Perf
tech_cloud_skills: Kubernetes, AWS, Docker, CI/CD, Nginx, Shell
tech_observability_skills: ELK Stack, SonarQube, K6, JMeter, TDD
tech_enterprise_skills: AI (OCR/Biometric), IBM BPM, GraphQL, REST APIs
